title: stenogyne elliptilobata
intro: Stenogyne elliptilobata, also known as Hairy Stenogyne or Hawaiian Stenogyne, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, Lamiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Stenogyne elliptilobata include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
